arabic_text:
دور کشف
دور قائم
دور محمد
دور عیسیٰ
دور موسیٰ
دور ابراہیم
دور نوح
دور آدم
دور ستر
قائم دور
صاحب دور
صاحب کور
صاحب مور
سلطان
قائم کور
قائم مور
english_text:
Cycle of Revelation (Daur Kashf)
Cycle of the Qa'im
Cycle of Muhammad
Cycle of Isa
Cycle of Musa
Cycle of Abraham
Cycle of Noah
Cycle of Adam
Cycle of Concealment (Daur Sitr)
Qa'im of the Cycle
Master of the Cycle (Sahib Daur)
Master of Kor (Sahib Kor)
Master of Mor (Sahib Mor) — Sultan
Qa'im of Kor
Qa'im of Mor
50,000
7000
57,000
alt_text: A hierarchical pyramid diagram. Top: yellow column 'دور کشف' (Cycle of Revelation) listing seven prophetic Daurs from Adam up through the Qa'im (دور آدم, دور نوح, دور ابراہیم, دور موسیٰ, دور عیسیٰ, دور محمد, دور قائم) — each annotated with '50,000' on the right margin. Cascading down via orange 'قائم' ovals: each prophetic Daur's Qa'im connects to the next level — 'صاحب دور' (Master of the Cycle). The connection through 'دور ستر' (Cycle of Concealment, 7000) accumulates to '57,000' per stage. Below, three further levels: 'قائم دور' → 'صاحب دور' (green), 'قائم کور' → 'صاحب کور' (green), 'قائم مور' → 'صاحب مور' (red) labeled 'سلطان' (Sultan).
notes: Master cosmic-hierarchy diagram of the chapter. Maps the seven prophetic Daurs onto the larger Kor-Mor scheme via Qa'im transitions. Each prophetic cycle is 50,000 years of Kashf + 7000 years of Sitr = 57,000 — and seven such cycles plus a Qa'im close out the Daur. The Daur in turn participates in Kor, and Kor in Mor, ascending to the Sultan.
